title: Provider table + capability records (DeepSeek text+tool-use only); env asserted; LiteLLM supply-chain pin

tests.summary: sdk-providers-ok — Providers block (8 tests) green: all 5 providers present (ollama-local/zai-glm/deepseek/minimax/llm-proxy); every static base URL is non-Anthropic; buildSdkEnv wires the non-Anthropic ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL + Vault ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN and clears inherited Anthropic vars (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY forced to ''); missing key fails loudly (ABSENT vs LOCKED); DeepSeek capability record is text+toolUse ONLY (no image/document/web-search/MCP); assertSupportsBlocks refuses MCP@deepseek and allows MCP@ollama; llm-proxy requires an explicit per-target baseUrl; per-target capability override (new-model onboarding) wins; LiteLLM pin enforced (1.82.7/1.82.8 FORBIDDEN, >1.82.6 exceeds, 1.82.6 allowed).

notes: env/argv asserted without spawning (Garrison's pure-factory seam). Live provider round-trips (where a key is present) belong to AS-ollama-live + AS-route and are env-flag gated. minimax clears pre-existing Anthropic env first (precedence trap). The base URLs mirror the model-router PROVIDERS registry; capability records are SDK-specific.
